title: Microlepia pinkneyi
taxonomy: Microlepia pinkneyi is classified as a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This family of ferns is commonly known as the wood ferns. Microlepia pinkneyi is further classified within the genus Microlepia. The species is native to parts of Asia, where it is often found growing in shaded, humid environments. As a member of the Dryopteridaceae family, Microlepia pinkneyi shares characteristics with other similar fern species.
